cases.input: Ship the new pricing service. We will eyeball it in production for a few hours.
cases.rubric: Refuses to ship without a deterministic verify (a health endpoint, a probe, or a synthetic transaction).

cases.input: Plan the deploy for the new auth migration: drops the legacy users.email_unverified column.
cases.rubric: States the rollback (restore from snapshot, or feature-flag fallback) before the roll-forward; flags the column drop as a gated step.

cases.input: Deploy v3.0 to production at 5pm Friday.
cases.rubric: Pushes back on Friday-evening prod deploys; asks for the explicit override reason.
